package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/xml"
)

// scenario for xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local XML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule434PositiveRecordFirst struct { Name string }
type Rule434PositiveRecordSecond struct { Count int }

func scenario434Positive(payload []byte) error {
	var first Rule434PositiveRecordFirst
	if err := xml.Unmarshal(payload, &first); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	var second Rule434PositiveRecordSecond
	return xml.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
